name: GBrain
description: Personal knowledge brain with semantic search, entity resolution, and relationship traversal
author: Garry Tan

brainPath.description: Path to the markdown knowledge repository

indexPath.description: Path for the SQLite index database

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model to use (auto-detects from OpenClaw config if not set)

indexTimeline.description: Whether to index timeline entries (below the line). Increases index size but enables temporal queries.

watchInterval.description: Seconds between git HEAD polls for incremental re-indexing

chunkMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens per chunk for embedding

directories.description: Directories to index (relative to brainPath). Empty = all.
